name: Ministry of Education and Higher Education (DGHE/Equivalence Committee)
notes: Licenses higher education and issues equivalency decisions for foreign credentials via DGHE/Equivalence Committee; use MEHE equivalency service pages for submission steps.

name: General Directorate of General Security
notes: Controls entry visas/residency; student visa/residency requests require prior university authorization, enrollment proof, and fee payment.

name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs & Emigrants (Consular Legalization)
notes: Legalizes Lebanese documents (including academic certificates) for use abroad; education documents require originals, copies, and per-certificate fees.
